description.en: Four original fantasy worlds, each created in cinematic and chibi form from reviewed image-job source art. The collection borrows a genre mood, never an existing character or franchise.
description.zh-CN: 四个原创幻想世界，每个都有原画版与 Q 版。源图通过 image job 生成并人工审查，借的是类型气韵，不借任何既有角色、造型或 IP。

title.zh-CN: 八座城市，各有自己的光。

description.en: Original city studies built from weather, street rhythm, terrain, and broad architectural cues, using reviewed image-job source art. No photograph, city logo, exact landmark, or official mascot is used.
description.zh-CN: 从天气、街道节奏、地形和建筑轮廓里提取城市气质，源图通过 image job 生成并人工审查，不使用照片、城市标志、地标复刻或官方吉祥物。

title.en: Twelve cities, each true to its own horizon.
title.zh-CN: 十二座城市，各有真实天际线。

description.en: Twelve original city studies across North America, Europe, and Asia-Pacific. Each scene is anchored in real geography, weather, vegetation, streets, and public skyline cues while using a newly composed, code-friendly viewpoint.
description.zh-CN: 覆盖北美、欧洲与亚太的十二套原创城市主题。每一幅都以真实地理、天气、植被、街道和公共天际线为依据，再重新组织成适合代码工作区的原创视角。

title.zh-CN: 四部国漫，两种 Fan Art 表达。

description.en: Unofficial AI-generated fan art inspired by A Record of a Mortal's Journey to Immortality, Renegade Immortal, Sword of Coming, and Battle Through the Heavens. No official stills, logos, or promotional assets are used. Underlying rights remain with their respective owners.
description.zh-CN: 以《凡人修仙传》《仙逆》《剑来》《斗破苍穹》角色为主题的非官方 AI Fan Art。未使用官方剧照、Logo 或宣传素材，角色与作品权利仍归各自权利方。

title.zh-CN: 四个一眼就能想起的场面。

description.en: Four newly composed unofficial fan-art scenes: the Void Hall, Wang Lin's wedding intervention, Chen Ping'an's confession, and the Three-Year Agreement. They recall story beats without copying official shots.
description.zh-CN: 四幅重新构图的非官方 Fan Art：虚天殿、王林抢婚、陈平安告白与三年之约。保留剧情记忆点，但不照搬官方镜头。

title.en: A little gratitude, rendered with a wink.
title.zh-CN: 把感谢画得认真一点，也有趣一点。

description.en: Two clearly unofficial, non-commercial parody portraits celebrating the Codex community. No OpenAI logo, product artwork, or official asset is used, and no endorsement is implied.
description.zh-CN: 两套明确标注、仅限非商业使用的 Codex 社区趣味致敬主题。未使用 OpenAI Logo、产品视觉或官方素材，也不暗示任何官方背书。

title.en: Six moods built for long sessions.
title.zh-CN: 六种适合长时间工作的氛围。

description.en: Original themes shaped around cozy focus, exploration, retro computing, and quiet spectacle—including a playful 2007 messenger-era chibi workspace.
description.zh-CN: 围绕舒适专注、探索、复古计算机与安静奇景创作的原创主题，其中包括一套 2007 即时通讯时代的趣味 Q 版工作区。

title.en: Five familiar places, held in a quieter light.
title.zh-CN: 五种熟悉风景，换一种更安静的光。

description.en: Five original scenes drawn from Jiangnan rain, Chang'an lantern light, Dunhuang color, bamboo tea, and a warm train crossing the northern snow.
description.zh-CN: 从江南雨巷、长安灯火、敦煌色彩、竹院清茶与北方雪原列车中提取的五套原创主题。

tagline.en: Mist settles beyond the moon gate.
tagline.zh-CN: 雾过月门，山路正好安静。

description.en: Ink-green ridgelines, a quiet moon gate, and a long road through the mist.
description.zh-CN: 墨绿山脊、月门与雾中长路，主视觉留在右侧，左侧保持安静。

tagline.en: A little guardian keeps the lantern lit.
tagline.zh-CN: 纸灯亮着，小山灵替你守夜。

description.en: A round original mountain spirit keeps watch beside a warm paper lantern.
description.zh-CN: 原创圆脸山灵守在纸灯旁，轻松、可爱，但不挤占原生控件。

tagline.en: One red line cuts through the star road.
tagline.zh-CN: 星路向前，红光只留一笔。

description.en: A lone celestial route cuts through cobalt constellations and restrained red light.
description.zh-CN: 钴蓝星图里穿过一条逆行天路，以克制红光做视觉锚点。

tagline.en: A small comet takes the long way home.
tagline.zh-CN: 坐上小彗星，慢慢划过夜空。

description.en: An original star spirit rides a tiny comet across a deep, quiet sky.
description.zh-CN: 原创星灵坐着小彗星划过夜空，保留足够留白给工作区。

tagline.en: The mountain holds still for one sword stroke.
tagline.zh-CN: 山很重，剑光只需要一线。

description.en: Black-ink peaks and one vermilion sword line, composed like a modern book cover.
description.zh-CN: 黑墨山峰与一线朱砂剑光，构图更像现代书封，而不是游戏截图。

tagline.en: The sword case is too big. The road can wait.
tagline.zh-CN: 剑匣太大，少年还是照常出发。

description.en: A tiny original swordling practices one careful stroke under a huge sunrise.
description.zh-CN: 原创剑童在巨大的日轮下练一笔剑式，稚气但不幼稚。

tagline.en: The cloud sea keeps the floating islands quiet.
tagline.zh-CN: 浮岛很远，云海把声音收住。

description.en: Floating islands meet a pale jade horizon in an original spirit-contract world.
description.zh-CN: 浮岛、玉色天际与原创灵契世界，整体清透，任务页也不会过分抢眼。

tagline.en: The cloud creature sleeps while the leaf drifts.
tagline.zh-CN: 团子睡着了，浮叶还在轻轻晃。

description.en: A soft original cloud creature naps on a floating leaf above the sea of mist.
description.zh-CN: 原创云团灵兽趴在浮叶上打盹，配色柔和，所有装饰都不可交互。

tagline.en: First light reaches the winter rooftops.
tagline.zh-CN: 冬日城轴，第一束光落在屋脊上。

description.en: Winter-blue air, measured rooflines, and the first warm light along a long city axis.
description.zh-CN: 冬日蓝调、舒展屋脊和城轴上的第一束暖光，画面克制而端正。

tagline.en: The tide stays out as the neon comes on.
tagline.zh-CN: 潮水未退，霓虹刚刚亮起。

description.en: River lines, vertical glass, and restrained neon settling into evening haze.
description.zh-CN: 江面线条、玻璃立面与入夜前的克制霓虹，像一张会呼吸的城市唱片。

tagline.en: Rain turns the circuit city green.
tagline.zh-CN: 一场阵雨，把整座城刷成绿光。

description.en: Fast rain crosses a leaf-green grid while the towers hold a cool electric glow.
description.zh-CN: 阵雨穿过叶绿色网格，塔楼亮着冷静的电光，速度感留在画面右侧。

tagline.en: River wind moves through the banyan shade.
tagline.zh-CN: 榕荫里有风，江面正好入夜。

description.en: Warm river air moves between banyan shade, curved light, and a soft amber skyline.
description.zh-CN: 珠水晚风穿过榕荫、弧光与琥珀色天际线，温暖，却不黏腻。

tagline.en: Rain at the bamboo window. Tea still warm.
tagline.zh-CN: 竹窗听雨，茶还没有凉。

description.en: Fine rain, bamboo shadow, tiled eaves, and tea steam keep the afternoon unhurried.
description.zh-CN: 细雨、竹影、瓦檐和一缕茶汽，把下午放慢了一点。

tagline.en: A letter from the lake can wait.
tagline.zh-CN: 湖上来信，不催你立刻回。

description.en: A long causeway, lotus marks, and distant rain settle into pale lake light.
description.zh-CN: 长堤、莲影和远雨落进浅浅湖光里，适合把注意力留给正在做的事。

tagline.en: Light climbs the city and follows the river.
tagline.zh-CN: 城在山上，光沿着江面向前。

description.en: Stacked slopes, river reflections, and one bright transit line turn depth into rhythm.
description.zh-CN: 层叠山坡、江面倒影和一条穿城光轨，把高低落差变成节奏。

tagline.en: Plum shadows leave one red note on old brick.
tagline.zh-CN: 梅影落在旧砖上，冬天有了一点红。

description.en: Old wall courses, plum branches, and river mist hold a quiet red winter note.
description.zh-CN: 城墙砖线、梅枝和江雾留下一点冬日红色，安静，也有筋骨。

tagline.en: Rain keeps time beneath the skyline.
tagline.zh-CN: 雨落在街区里，天际线替城市计时。

description.en: Brownstone shadow, elevated-track rhythm, and a rain-softened Manhattan horizon make a focused metropolitan workspace.
description.zh-CN: 褐石街区的阴影、高架轨道的节奏与被雨雾收柔的曼哈顿天际线，组成一套利落的都市工作区。

tagline.en: The hill rises; the fog edits the rest.
tagline.zh-CN: 坡道向上，雾把多余的部分轻轻删去。

description.en: A steep street, weathered Victorian color, bay fog, and one restrained bridge line capture San Francisco without becoming a postcard.
description.zh-CN: 陡坡、维多利亚式街屋、海湾雾气与一笔克制的桥影，让旧金山清晰可辨，却不落入明信片构图。

tagline.en: Steel, lake light, and one clean northern wind.
tagline.zh-CN: 钢架、湖光，还有一阵干净的北风。

description.en: Lake Michigan light meets elevated rail steel and the measured verticals of the Loop.
description.zh-CN: 密歇根湖的冷光、高架铁路的钢结构与 Loop 区克制的竖向线条相遇。

tagline.en: Lake light holds the city after rain.
tagline.zh-CN: 雨停以后，湖光把城市留在蓝调里。

description.en: Brick warehouses, ravine-green edges, Lake Ontario haze, and a slender skyline mark Toronto's quiet confidence.
description.zh-CN: 砖仓、峡谷绿意、安大略湖雾气与一笔纤细天际线，写出多伦多安静而确定的城市气质。

tagline.en: Rainforest shadow meets harbour glass.
tagline.zh-CN: 雨林的深绿，在港湾玻璃上慢慢亮起。

description.en: Cedar rain, mountain layers, seawall reflections, and a compact glass skyline keep Vancouver close to its landscape.
description.zh-CN: 雪松细雨、山体层次、海堤倒影与紧凑玻璃天际线，让温哥华始终贴着自然生长。

tagline.en: Old stone, river rain, one amber window.
tagline.zh-CN: 旧石、河雨，还有一扇琥珀色的窗。

description.en: Wet Georgian stone, Thames haze, and layered civic silhouettes form a restrained London study.
description.zh-CN: 潮湿的乔治时代石材、泰晤士河雾与层叠公共建筑剪影，构成一幅克制的伦敦城市研究。

tagline.en: Dawn moves softly across the zinc roofs.
tagline.zh-CN: 晨光越过锌皮屋顶，城市还没有完全醒来。

description.en: Zinc roofs, pale stone, chimney rhythm, and a distant iron silhouette make a quiet Paris morning.
description.zh-CN: 锌皮屋顶、浅色石墙、烟囱节奏与远处铁塔剪影，共同组成一段安静的巴黎清晨。

tagline.en: Brick, rail, and amber light stay honest.
tagline.zh-CN: 砖墙、轨道与琥珀灯光，保留城市真实的棱角。

description.en: Spree reflections, rail viaducts, brick industry, and a distant television tower shape Berlin's practical nocturne.
description.zh-CN: 施普雷河倒影、铁路高架、工业砖墙与远处电视塔，组成柏林务实而清醒的夜曲。

tagline.en: Stone keeps the warmth after sunset.
tagline.zh-CN: 夕阳退去以后，石墙还留着温度。

description.en: Travertine, umbrella pines, terracotta roofs, and a layered hill-city horizon hold Rome's long afternoon.
description.zh-CN: 洞石、伞松、陶瓦屋顶与层叠台地天际线，留住罗马漫长午后的余温。

tagline.en: The last train draws one line through the rain.
tagline.zh-CN: 末班电车穿过雨幕，只留下一道安静的光。

description.en: A neighborhood rail crossing, compact rooftops, rain reflections, and a distant tower keep Tokyo intimate and unmistakable.
description.zh-CN: 社区铁路道口、紧凑屋顶、雨中倒影与远处塔影，让东京既亲近又清晰可辨。

tagline.en: Warm rain turns the whole city green.
tagline.zh-CN: 一场暖雨，把整座城市重新洗成绿色。

description.en: Shophouse shade, tropical rain, garden infrastructure, and a precise skyline express Singapore's cultivated density.
description.zh-CN: 骑楼阴影、热带阵雨、花园式基础设施与精确天际线，共同写出新加坡被细心维护的密度。

tagline.en: Harbour wind arrives before the city wakes.
tagline.zh-CN: 城市醒来以前，海湾的风先到了。

description.en: Sandstone, eucalyptus shadow, ferry wakes, and harbour architecture give Sydney a bright, breathable workspace.
description.zh-CN: 砂岩、桉树阴影、渡轮尾波与海湾建筑，让悉尼主题明亮、开阔，也保留真实呼吸感。

tagline.en: They still find each other through the mist.
tagline.zh-CN: 隔着雾与石台，还是看见了彼此。

description.en: Unofficial fan art of Han Li and Nangong Wan meeting across a misty cultivation terrace.
description.zh-CN: 韩立与南宫婉隔着雾中石台相望，克制、疏离，又保留彼此牵挂。

work.en: A Record of a Mortal's Journey to Immortality

tagline.en: Guard the green bottle. Mind the tiny herb garden.
tagline.zh-CN: 小绿瓶看得紧，灵药园也不能乱。

description.en: Chibi Han Li and Nangong Wan guard a tiny green bottle beside a miniature herb garden.
description.zh-CN: Q 版韩立与南宫婉守着一只小绿瓶，旁边是一方缩小的灵药园。

work.en: A Record of a Mortal's Journey to Immortality

name.en: Renegade Immortal · A Vow Against Heaven

tagline.en: One warm lamp holds against the cold.
tagline.zh-CN: 万里都是冷色，只有一盏灯还暖。

description.en: Unofficial fan art of Wang Lin and Li Muwan beneath a cold sky, held together by one warm lantern.
description.zh-CN: 王林与李慕婉立在冷色天幕下，万里寒意里只留一盏暖灯。

tagline.en: The carving takes time. So does the little furnace.
tagline.zh-CN: 木雕慢慢刻，丹炉也慢慢亮。

description.en: Chibi Wang Lin carves a tiny figure while Li Muwan tends a glowing pill furnace.
description.zh-CN: Q 版王林低头刻木雕，李慕婉在旁照看一只发着暖光的小丹炉。

name.en: Sword of Coming · Two Young Swords

tagline.en: One carries the sword. One looks back.
tagline.zh-CN: 一人背剑，一人回头，山路就在前面。

description.en: Unofficial fan art of Chen Ping'an and Ning Yao walking out of a small town toward an open mountain road.
description.zh-CN: 陈平安与宁姚从小镇走向山路，一人背剑，一人回头，脚下就是大道。

tagline.en: The sword case is heavy, but the road goes on.
tagline.zh-CN: 剑匣有点重，下一段路还是要走。

description.en: Chibi Chen Ping'an carries an oversized sword case while Ning Yao points toward the next road.
description.zh-CN: Q 版陈平安背着过大的剑匣，宁姚抱剑指向下一段山路。

tagline.en: Flame ahead, serpent behind, neither steps back.
tagline.zh-CN: 异火在前，蛇影在后，两人都没有退。

description.en: Unofficial fan art of Xiao Yan and Medusa framed by green flame and a restrained violet serpent aura.
description.zh-CN: 萧炎与美杜莎并肩立在异火与紫色蛇影之间，危险感与默契同时存在。

name.en: Battle Through · Little Fire Lotus Team

tagline.en: A tiny fire lotus draws a very serious audience.
tagline.zh-CN: 火莲不大，围观的人倒很认真。

description.en: Chibi Xiao Yan balances a tiny fire lotus while Medusa watches with an unimpressed serpent companion.
description.zh-CN: Q 版萧炎托着一朵迷你火莲，美杜莎和一条小蛇在旁边冷静围观。

tagline.en: The hall doors rise beyond the frozen steps.
tagline.zh-CN: 冰阶尽头，殿门比人想得更高。

description.en: A newly composed fan-art view of Han Li entering the immense ice-blue Void Hall.
description.zh-CN: 韩立踏入冰蓝色虚天殿，巨大的殿门、冰阶与人影共同压出秘境尺度。

work.en: A Record of a Mortal's Journey to Immortality

tagline.en: Snow lifts the wedding red as he arrives.
tagline.zh-CN: 红绸被风雪卷起，他终于赶到了。

description.en: Wang Lin arrives above the wedding hall as cold wind tears through the red ceremony and Li Muwan looks up.
description.zh-CN: 王林从风雪中落在喜堂上空，红色婚仪被冷风卷开，李慕婉抬头看见来人。

name.en: Sword of Coming · One Honest Sentence

tagline.en: One honest sentence at the end of the lane.
tagline.zh-CN: 巷口只有一句话，说完就没有退路。

description.en: Chen Ping'an speaks plainly to Ning Yao in a quiet small-town lane after the rain.
description.zh-CN: 雨后小镇巷口，陈平安认真说出喜欢，宁姚抱剑站在暖灯与青石之间。

tagline.en: Three years later, neither side has forgotten.
tagline.zh-CN: 三年过去，擂台两端都没有忘。

description.en: Xiao Yan faces Nalan Yanran across the mountain arena as green flame cuts through cloud and stone.
description.zh-CN: 云岚山擂台两端，萧炎与纳兰嫣然隔空对峙，青色异火穿过云与石阶。

tagline.en: God of Reset
tagline.zh-CN: 重置之神

description.en: An unofficial illuminated-manuscript parody thanking Tibo Sottiaux for leading Codex and keeping builders moving.
description.zh-CN: 一幅非官方手抄本式趣味致敬画，感谢 Tibo Sottiaux 带领 Codex，也感谢每一次让创作继续的重置。

tagline.en: God of Reset
tagline.zh-CN: 重置之神

description.en: An unofficial Chinese mural-style parody portrait celebrating Tibo Sottiaux and the resets Codex users cheer for.
description.zh-CN: 一套非官方中式壁画趣味致敬主题，献给 Tibo Sottiaux，也献给 Codex 用户最喜欢看到的额度重置。

tagline.en: Your tiny blue coding buddy just came online.
tagline.zh-CN: 蓝色代码搭子上线，今天继续给老板打工。

description.en: A glossy blue chibi workspace inspired by the optimism of 2000s desktop messengers, rebuilt with an original mascot and no borrowed interface or brand assets.
description.zh-CN: 一套来自 2000 年代桌面即时通讯记忆的冰蓝 Q 版工作区，使用原创代码吉祥物，不复刻任何品牌、角色或界面。

tagline.en: One lamp, one storm, and plenty of time.
tagline.zh-CN: 一盏灯，一场雨，时间刚刚好。

description.en: A warm reading room looking into a rain-soaked glasshouse, with walnut shelves and a quiet amber desk on the right.
description.zh-CN: 胡桃木书架与玻璃温室连成一间安静阅读室，雨水落在窗外，右侧书桌留着一盏暖灯。

tagline.en: First light arrives sixteen times a day.
tagline.zh-CN: 每天十六次日出，这一轮刚刚开始。

description.en: A quiet 1970s-inspired orbital observatory watches sunrise roll over Earth through broad curved windows.
description.zh-CN: 带有 1970 年代科学想象气质的轨道观测站，从弧形舷窗望见晨光越过地球。

tagline.en: The quietest stand-up is eight hundred meters down.
tagline.zh-CN: 八百米深处，今天的站会格外安静。

description.en: An underwater research window opens onto drifting jellyfish, distant whales, and a single pool of cyan instrument light.
description.zh-CN: 水下研究舱外漂着水母与远处鲸影，右侧仪器台只留一片克制的青色微光。

tagline.en: Ship it before the neon horizon.
tagline.zh-CN: 在霓虹地平线之前，把这一版发出去。

description.en: A restrained retro-future highway crosses a violet desert toward a coral sun, with analog dashboard glow on the right.
description.zh-CN: 克制的复古未来公路穿过紫色荒漠驶向珊瑚色落日，右侧保留模拟仪表盘的柔光。

tagline.en: Fresh snow. Warm coffee. Zero notifications.
tagline.zh-CN: 新雪、热咖啡，以及零条通知。

description.en: A timber cabin desk looks across snow-heavy pines toward a pale alpine sunrise, quiet and tactile rather than postcard-perfect.
description.zh-CN: 木屋书桌望向覆雪松林与浅色山间日出，保留真实木材和冬日空气的触感。

tagline.en: Rain threads the lane; the courtyard keeps its light.
tagline.zh-CN: 雨把巷子拉长，小院还亮着一盏灯。

description.en: White walls, dark tiles, wet stone, and a small waterside courtyard settle into pearl-gray Jiangnan rain.
description.zh-CN: 白墙黛瓦、湿青石与临水小院落进珍珠灰的江南细雨里，右侧灯火很轻。

tagline.en: The avenue glows; one quiet desk remains.
tagline.zh-CN: 长街灯火正盛，案前只留一方安静。

description.en: A Tang-inspired avenue opens beneath layered lantern light and deep indigo sky, composed as original historical fantasy rather than a reconstruction.
description.zh-CN: 唐风长街在层层灯火与深靛夜色下展开，以原创历史想象构图，不复刻具体古建或影视场景。

tagline.en: Mineral color drifts into a desert sky.
tagline.zh-CN: 矿物色从壁面醒来，飞进沙漠星河。

description.en: Original mineral-pigment ribbons, desert cliffs, and a lapis night sky evoke Dunhuang color without copying any historic mural figure.
description.zh-CN: 原创矿物色飘带、沙崖与青金石夜空借敦煌色彩起兴，不临摹任何具体壁画人物或纹样。

tagline.en: The kettle hums beneath a roof of rain.
tagline.zh-CN: 檐雨落得密，炉上的水刚刚响。

description.en: A modest bamboo courtyard, clay stove, and open lattice window make a tactile, unhurried workspace.
description.zh-CN: 竹院、泥炉与半开的格窗组成一间不赶时间的工作区，材质朴素，雨声很近。

tagline.en: Warm carriage light crosses the blue hour.
tagline.zh-CN: 蓝调雪原很长，车厢里一直亮着暖灯。

description.en: An unbranded green passenger train moves through blue-hour snowfields and dark pines, with warm carriage windows on the right.
description.zh-CN: 没有标识的绿色客车穿过蓝调雪原与深色松林，右侧车窗留着一排真实而温暖的灯。
